response.overview: It tells the story of a group of skate kids in Kampung Baru. Alice (Amelia Christie) and her mother, May (Sazzy Falak) have just moved to Kampung Baru to seek a fresh start with hopes of escaping her problems and her past life. Alice befriends Ria (Serra Kamal) and Siska (Sharifah Rose), teenagers in Kampung Baru who have their own problems. Ria faces problems with her hot-tempered stepfather and Siska is so poor that she has to steal food. As a girl who has just arrived in the big city, Alice feels sympathy for her new friends' situations and wants to help solve their problems. At the same time, Alice becomes interested in a troubled young man in her neighborhood named Raz (Aniq Durar).
response.title: Alice Kampung Baru
